name: Crash Puzzle Hammer-San
short_description: A full-fledged action puzzle game with simple controls. Enjoy a massive volume of content with 300 stages and a stage editor that lets you create your own levels freely. Share your edited stages with other users via the Steam Workshop.
detailed_description:
◆ Features


A Simple Yet Deep Action-Puzzle Game!
Experience true action-puzzle gameplay with simple controls—just use the directional keys (left stick) and a single button! It's a fixed-screen, stage-clear type of action-puzzle game. A tutorial that teaches you how to play in 5 minutes is included!

300 Massive Stages!
As you play, you'll unlock more and more stages. If you get stuck, you can skip ahead and try later stages. The difficulty ramps up to brutal levels towards the end!

Create Your Own Stages! Includes an Editing Feature
Design your own stages and upload them to the Steam Workshop to share with players around the world. You can also subscribe to and play stages created by other users via Steam Workshop.

◆ Actions


Attack: Use the directional keys and the button to strike in any direction (up, down, left, or right).
Push: Hold left or right to push crystals.
Climb: Press left/right and up to climb one-step ledges.

◆ Other Features


Your best times for each stage are recorded and reflected in the rankings.
Replays of your best time are automatically saved and can be reviewed at any time.
The game speed can be adjusted at any time during gameplay (5 levels of speed available).

◆ Story


The ancient, cursed demon palace has returned, and the souls of the people have been trapped by monsters!
But one brave girl, "Hammer-san," has appeared. With her hammer in hand, she sets out on a quest to the demon palace to free the imprisoned souls...

supported_languages: English, Japanese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
